task_name: Nginx Access Log - Traffic Patterns by Time
notes: Excellent execution. Agent correctly parsed 1000 JSON entries, identified exact time range (May 17, 08:05–16:05 UTC), computed accurate hourly breakdowns, recognized peak at 15:00 (130 requests), analyzed bandwidth patterns with correct 304 vs 200 interpretation, provided statistical trend analysis (CV 0.039, steady baseline), classified IPs (60 multi-hour, 13 burst), and identified dominant IP (80.91.33.133, 210 requests, 21%). Report is well-structured markdown with tables, statistics, and professional presentation. Generated matplotlib charts and supporting JSON summary. Minor deduction only for creating duplicate markdown files and chart path references that may not resolve in all contexts.
